title: Add SceneWeave to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [SceneWeave](https://scene-weave.vercel.app) to writing
- Paste a text story into the field or use a URL to an existing one; SceneWeave currently supports URLs under testing.

Fixes #10104

gist.headline: Weaving stories into scenes
gist.blurb: A new community app called SceneWeave just landed in the greenhouse! Paste a story or drop a URL, and watch it weave your text into something magical.
gist.summary: Added the community-built SceneWeave app to the writing category, allowing users to input text stories or URLs for processing.
gist.impact: Users can now explore SceneWeave in the community showcase to experiment with text and URL-based story weaving.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee operating a magical loom that weaves glowing text and code into a tapestry, representing the 'SceneWeave' writing app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, operating a magical wooden loom that weaves glowing text and code into a beautiful tapestry. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, operating a magical wooden loom that weaves glowing text and code into a beautiful tapestry. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
